title: elaeocarpus zambalensis
intro: Elaeocarpus zambalensis, also known as Zambales blue forget-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its antitussive and expectorant properties. The leaves and flowers of Elaeocarpus zambalensis have been used in traditional medicine to provide relief from coughs and colds, as well as to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
